mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
update Student
name=#{name}, no=#{no}, gender=#{gender}, phone=#{phone}, degree=#{degree}, clazz_id=#{clazzId}, id_card=#{idCard}, is_college=#{isCollege}, address=#{address}, graduation_date=#{graduationDate}, id=#{id} violation_count=violation_count+#{violationCount}, violation_score=violation_score+#{violationScore},
mapper.select: select (case when degree=1 then '初中' when degree=2 then '高中' when degree=3 then '大专' when degree=4 then '本科' when degree=5 then '硕士' when degree=6 then '博士' else '其他' end) name, count(*) value from student group by degree
select c.name name, count(*) value from student s left join clazz c on s.clazz_id=c.id group by s.clazz_id
